title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 236.110 - Inquest to be in writing
text:
236.110.  Inquest to be in writing. — The inquest of the jury shall be reduced to writing, signed by each of the jurors, and returned by the sheriff, together with the writ and a statement of the manner in which he executed it, into the court whence it issued, without delay.
(RSMo 1939 § 10296) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9167; 1919 § 7409; 1909 § 5466
